title: Alanna
summary: Alana, Alanna, or other variants, is a female given name. It is latinized feminine form of Alan and its usage is relatively modern.
text:
Alana, Alanna, or other variants, is a female given name. It is latinized feminine form of Alan and its usage is relatively modern.
